title: Assessing the Economic Impact of the Trade Agreement Between the EU and Signatory Countries of the Andean Community

summary.about: The expected economic effects of the EU trade agreements with Colombia and Peru.
summary.audience: EU and Andean trade officials, exporters and development policymakers.
summary.method: Updates an earlier sustainability impact assessment using the final agreement, participating countries and newer data.
summary.insights: Colombia and Peru gain modestly in GDP and wages, while bilateral exports rise substantially and EU-wide gains remain comparatively small.
